name: Spiced Apple-Pear Butter
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds Rome Beauty or other baking apples, peeled, cored and coarsely chopped
2 1/2 pounds pears, peeled, cored and coarsely chopped
1 cup apple cider or apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F and place the rack in the center.
2. In a saucepan, combine the chopped apples and pears.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover.
3. Simmer until the fruit is very tender, about 15 minutes.
4. Puree the mixture using an electric or hand blender.
5. Stir in half of the sugar, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and orange zest.
6. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square glass baking dish and add the remaining orange zest.
7. Bake uncovered until the mixture thickens and browns, stirring often for about 1 hour and 20 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and discard the orange zest.
9. Let cool before serving or storing in the refrigerator (can be made up to one week ahead).
